zh.title: 以太坊/美元技术分析：短期震荡偏空，关注支撑反弹机会
zh.content:
当前以太坊价格位于2090.36美元，距离20日均线2112.08美元略有偏下，显示短期内价格承压。日内波动区间狭窄，高低点2093.01/2084.31说明市场交投情绪谨慎，多空力量相对均衡，短线可能继续震荡整理。  

MACD指标显示快线为-6.98且低于零轴，短期空头动能占优，但缺乏信号线参考，暗示卖压存在但尚未形成强烈趋势。缺少RSI数据使超买超卖判断受限，但价格仍接近支撑区域，需观察反弹意愿。  

关键支撑位在2080-2085美元附近，如果有效守住，可能触发技术性反弹；阻力位则在2110-2115美元区间，突破后才有机会延续上行。投资者应密切关注成交量变化和突破信号，以判断多空方向。  

交易建议上，短线可在支撑附近布局低吸，止损设置略低于2080美元；若价格回到阻力区间附近，适合减仓或考虑短线获利了结。总体来看，保持谨慎，短期内以震荡偏空策略为主，等待明确趋势信号再加大仓位操作。

en.title: Ethereum vs US Dollar Technical Analysis
en.content:
Ethereum is currently trading near $2090, showing minimal movement over the past 24 hours with a 0.20% gain. The price action remains tightly confined between intraday support at $2084 and resistance at $2093, suggesting a period of consolidation. This narrow range reflects market indecision, with neither buyers nor sellers exerting strong influence. Observing how Ethereum behaves around the $2110–$2115 zone will be crucial, as a breakout above this could signal a resumption of upward momentum.  

The MACD reading at -6.98 indicates persistent bearish pressure despite the slight price uptick. Although the signal line is unavailable, the negative MACD implies momentum is still skewed toward sellers. Meanwhile, the SMA(20) at $2112 is currently above the market price, acting as a dynamic resistance. Until Ethereum manages to reclaim this level convincingly, short-term rallies are likely to encounter selling pressure, making aggressive long positions riskier.  

Support around $2080–$2085 is critical, as a decisive breakdown below this zone could open the door to further declines toward $2050. Conversely, resistance near $2110–$2115 and the psychological $2120 level is likely to cap upside moves unless volume accelerates. Traders may consider entering long positions near the lower support zone with tight stops, while short-term momentum traders could explore selling into minor rallies approaching the SMA(20) or $2115.  

Overall, Ethereum is in a cautious consolidation phase, with short-term trends skewed slightly bearish due to MACD dynamics and SMA positioning. Risk-managed strategies emphasizing key support and resistance levels are recommended. Breakouts or breakdowns from the $2085–$2115 corridor are likely to define the next directional swing, so monitoring volume and momentum indicators will be essential for confirming the trend’s strength before committing to significant positions.
